title: Supplementary Material: CoverageAnalyzer (CAn): A Tool for Inspection of Modification Signatures in RNA Sequencing Profiles
author: Hauenschild, Ralf
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Supplementary material for  Biomolecules   2016 ,  6 , 42; doi:10.3390/biom6040042: 

  CoverageAnalyzerWin64Setup1.1.2.sfx.exe:  Installation package for Windows 64 bit 
 CoverageAnalyzerMacOSX64bitSetup1.1.2.zip:  Installation package for MAC OSX 64 bit 
 CoverageAnalyzerLinux64bitSetup1.1.2.zip:  Installation package for Linux 64 bit 
 workflow_overview.pdf:  CoverageAnalyzer workflow overview 
 CoverageAnalyzer2Modomics.py:  Utility for annotation FASTA files and conversion of CAn output to MODOMICS format 
 Coverage_Analyzer_-_Manual.pdf:  CoverageAnalyzer user manual 
 Screencast_-_QuickStart_-_CoverageAnalyzer.avi:  Quick-start screencast video covering installation and analytic workflow 
 README_FIRST.txt:  Information to read ahead of installation
